wine_tours.name: Prestelli Sicily Tours - Etna Three Wineries Private Tour
wine_tours.description: Private 6-8 hour tour of three of Etna's best wineries with expert sommelier; vineyard walks, cellar visits and wine tastings with fresh local cuisine; departure from Taormina, Messina or Catania.
wine_tours.tip: Request Cottanera, Benanti and Palmento Costanzo for the strongest contrade-focused itinerary.

wine_tours.name: Go-Etna Wine and Volcano Tour
wine_tours.description: 8-hour off-road 4x4 Etna tour combining volcano hiking, lava cave exploration and a winery visit with olive oil tastings and Sicilian lunch; available April-October.
highlights: Lava cave with helmets and torches
wine_tours.tip: Combine adventure and wine; the lava cave visit before the winery tasting is a unique sequencing.

wine_tours.name: Wine Tour in Sicily - Etna and Catania
wine_tours.description: Specialist wine tour operator (Essence of Sicily S.r.l.s.) covering Etna's north and south slopes; visits to Barone di Villagrande, Gambino, Benanti, Tenuta Terre Nere and Fessina with sommelier-led tastings.
wine_tours.tip: Peppe Mendola's Etna north slope itinerary is particularly valued for contrade detail.

wine_tours.name: Marsala Wine House Tour
wine_tours.description: Guided tour of the historic Marsala wine houses (Florio, Pellegrino, Donnafugata) combining cellar architecture with Marsala DOC tastings; covers the Florio family history and the British origins of Marsala wine.
highlights: Marsala history and Florio family story
wine_tours.tip: Pair with the afternoon Mozia Phoenician island boat trip for a full Marsala day.

wine_tours.name: Pantelleria Zibibbo and Passito Tour
wine_tours.description: Seasonal island wine tour of Pantelleria's UNESCO-listed Zibibbo alberello vineyards; covers sun-drying process for Passito di Pantelleria DOC, Donnafugata's Ben Ryé estate and traditional dammuso architecture.
wine_tours.tip: Summer-only; combine with the Ben Ryé sotto le stelle evening experience for the full Pantelleria wine immersion.

wine_tours.name: Cerasuolo di Vittoria Wine Tour
wine_tours.description: Wine tour of Sicily's only DOCG zone covering Donnafugata Vittoria, Planeta Noto and Frappato-specialist producers; combines honey-colored limestone landscapes with tastings of the Nero d'Avola and Frappato blend.
wine_tours.tip: Add a baroque Ragusa Ibla walking tour for a UNESCO World Heritage double-header.

wine_tours.name: Prestelli Wine Lovers Tour of Etna - Multi-Day
wine_tours.description: Multi-day private wine tour of over 10 of Sicily's best wineries; custom-designed by Prestelli wine specialists; covers Etna contrade, Marsala houses, Cerasuolo di Vittoria and Noto DOC in a single immersive itinerary.
wine_tours.tip: The most comprehensive single itinerary for wine-focused visitors who want to cover Sicily in depth.

wine_tours.name: Tasca d'Almerita Regaleali Estate Tour
wine_tours.address: Contrada Regaleali SNC, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno (CL), Sicily
wine_tours.description: Estate tour and tasting at Tasca d'Almerita's legendary Regaleali winery in central Sicily; covers 200-plus years of family winemaking history, organic vineyards and a tasting of their flagship wines including Rosso del Conte.
wine_tours.tip: Combine with an overnight at the Rosemarie Tasca d'Almerita B&B nearby for the full estate experience.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Regaleali SNC, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno CL Italy
